title: StoryPipeline
description: Per-feature per-story pipeline state for the streaming design->build workflow. The design lane runs ahead, moving each story designing -> awaiting-gate -> ready; the single build lane consumes the FIFO build_queue one story at a time (build_active), then -> done. The orchestrator owns this; persisted as .tdd/features/<F>/pipeline.json. Exactly one story builds at a time.

stories.description: Keyed by story id (S<n>[-slug]). Every story the design lane has touched.

status.description: designing = design lane drafting/annotating/ordering; awaiting-gate = surfaced to the PO for the per-story spec gate; ready = gate-approved, queued for build; building = the single build lane is on it (on its experiment branch); awaiting-acceptance = built + deployed, the PO is reviewing the running story; done = accepted + merged into the feature branch; discarded = the PO threw it away (experiment torn down, out of sprint).

gate.description: The per-story spec gate (phase 2b). Isolated here in pipeline.json, NOT in the per-feature gates.json. Present once the story has been surfaced for review; an approved gate is what authorizes the awaiting-gate -> ready transition.

status.description: open = surfaced, awaiting the HIL decision; approved = the HIL (or Human Proxy headless) approved the story into the sprint; withdrawn = approval rescinded, story pulled back out of the build flow.

spec_hash.description: Hash of the story's spec artifact at approval, anchoring the decision.

experiment.description: The experiment branch the story is built on: an ephemeral paired Lakebase branch forked from feature HEAD. On accept it is merged into the feature branch; on discard/revise it is torn down.

parent.description: The feature branch this experiment forked from.

parent_sha.description: Feature-branch HEAD sha at cut time.

n.description: 1 (default) or the count of competing experiments in an N>=2 race.

status.description: active = building/under review; merged = accepted + merged into the feature branch; discarded = torn down (rejected or revised).

acceptance.description: The PO's post-build accept/discard/revise decision, distinct from the pre-build spec gate.

decision.description: null while the PO is still reviewing (awaiting-acceptance); otherwise the decision.

build_queue.description: FIFO of gate-approved (ready) story ids waiting for the single build lane. The head is dispatched next when the lane is free.

build_active.description: The story id the single Navigator+Driver build lane is currently building, or null when idle. At most one.
